Ambiguous holding CENTRAL_MANAGED: Managed sleeve mapped using configured account-level assumption.
No modeled ACA bridge year was available; estimated bridge year as 2027.
Projected bridge-year MAGI was unavailable; defaulted projected MAGI to 0.

narrative.whereThingsStand: You are tracking about $916,923 net worth, salary through 2027-07-01, 2 modeled windfall(s) totaling $1,000,000 starting in 2028, and estimated Social Security of about $73,200/year once claims start. Latest modeled success rate is pending until analysis completes.
narrative.whatMattersNow: Highest priority right now: protect aca bridge subsidy eligibility. The top actions are sorted by urgency and quantified gap size so execution can focus on the most material near-term moves first.

actionCards.title: Protect ACA bridge subsidy eligibility
actionCards.detail: Bridge year 2027 MAGI is $0; keep a cushion under the ACA-friendly ceiling (an inferred ACA ceiling).
actionCards.whyItMatters: Managing MAGI in bridge years protects premium support and prevents avoidable healthcare-cost spikes.

phases.label: Pre-Retirement
phases.objective: Build runway and execution readiness before earned income stops.

phases.label: Bridge To Medicare
phases.objective: Manage MAGI and withdrawal sourcing while ACA subsidy sensitivity is highest.

inferredAssumptions: No modeled ACA bridge year was available; estimated bridge year as 2027.
Projected bridge-year MAGI was unavailable; defaulted projected MAGI to 0.

actions.title: Conservative ACA bridge cash staging
actions.objective: Pre-fund bridge-year spending from taxable liquidity so MAGI management has more room.
actions.whyNow: Bridge years are upcoming; staging liquidity early avoids forced high-MAGI moves later.

laymanExpansion.storyHook: This is a bridge move so healthcare income rules do not force bad timing decisions.
laymanExpansion.plainEnglishTask: Move about $4,645 from CENTRAL_MANAGED into CASH across your taxable accounts.
laymanExpansion.whyImportant: Base scenario impact is +0.0 pts success and +$0 per month of supported spending, with 100% direction consistency in sensitivity runs.
walkthroughSteps: Set a reminder and review this monthly until the trigger appears.
Step 1: In Joint WROS - TOD (Managed), move about $4,645 (5.6% of CENTRAL_MANAGED) from CENTRAL_MANAGED to CASH.
After the trades settle, run the plan again and compare success rate, supported spending, and annual federal tax.
watchOuts: Taxable-account moves can realize capital gains; check tax lot impact before trading.
Use these dollar amounts as guides; if prices move, keep the direction and approximate size.
Pause and re-check if this conflicts with near-term cash needs, withdrawals, or required distributions.

phases.label: Medicare + IRMAA Shaping
phases.objective: Stay ahead of two-year IRMAA lookback pressure with smoother income timing.

actions.title: Balanced IRMAA lookback flexibility buffer
actions.objective: Build flexibility before IRMAA lookback years so withdrawals can stay under surcharge cliffs when needed.
actions.whyNow: Medicare years are approaching; adding liquidity now widens IRMAA response options.

laymanExpansion.storyHook: This creates room so IRMAA lookback years are less likely to surprise your premiums.
laymanExpansion.plainEnglishTask: Move about $14,588 from SCHD into CASH across your pre-tax accounts.
laymanExpansion.whyImportant: Base scenario impact is +0.0 pts success and +$0 per month of supported spending, with 100% direction consistency in sensitivity runs.
walkthroughSteps: Queue this for the next quarter.
Step 1: In Rollover IRA, move about $14,588 (8.0% of SCHD) from SCHD to CASH.
After the trades settle, run the plan again and compare success rate, supported spending, and annual federal tax.
watchOuts: Keep this inside the same tax bucket to avoid accidental tax consequences.
Use these dollar amounts as guides; if prices move, keep the direction and approximate size.
Pause and re-check if this conflicts with near-term cash needs, withdrawals, or required distributions.

action.title: Balanced IRMAA lookback flexibility buffer
action.objective: Build flexibility before IRMAA lookback years so withdrawals can stay under surcharge cliffs when needed.
action.whyNow: Medicare years are approaching; adding liquidity now widens IRMAA response options.

laymanExpansion.storyHook: This creates room so IRMAA lookback years are less likely to surprise your premiums.
laymanExpansion.plainEnglishTask: Move about $14,588 from SCHD into CASH across your pre-tax accounts.
laymanExpansion.whyImportant: Base scenario impact is +0.0 pts success and +$0 per month of supported spending, with 100% direction consistency in sensitivity runs.
walkthroughSteps: Queue this for the next quarter.

After the trades settle, run the plan again and compare success rate, supported spending, and annual federal tax.
watchOuts: Keep this inside the same tax bucket to avoid accidental tax consequences.

items.title: Roth conversion sizing to RMD start
items.summary: Need roughly $31,399/year of pre-tax reduction between retirement (2027) and RMD start (2039) to fully drain today's pre-tax balance. Use as sizing anchor, not final recommendation.

items.title: Home sale capital-gains treatment
items.summary: Home sale event exists but cost basis is missing, so taxable gain is not fully modeled.

items.title: Home sale liquidity assumption
items.summary: Model currently assumes full home sale proceeds are available as plan liquidity; set liquidity amount if part is reinvested.

items.title: Social Security taxation
items.summary: Federal tax engine includes provisional-income Social Security taxation each year.

items.title: Healthcare inflation trajectory
items.summary: Healthcare premiums are projected with 5.5% annual medical inflation.

items.title: Early-retirement runway exposure
items.summary: Cash runway is short by $56,592 vs 18-month essential-plus-fixed target ($108,000).

items.title: HSA spend-down strategy
items.summary: HSA strategy is enabled and available for healthcare funding decisions.

items.title: Long-term care tail risk
items.summary: Long-term care cost assumption is active with 45% event probability.

modelFidelity.effectOnReliability: Moderate reliability: outputs are usable but depend on estimated/inferred inputs.

inputs.label: Rob birth date
inputs.detail: Required for age timeline, RMD timing, and Social Security coordination.

inputs.label: Debbie birth date
inputs.detail: Required for age timeline, RMD timing, and Social Security coordination.

inputs.label: Salary end date
inputs.detail: Required for retirement-year transition and bridge withdrawal modeling.

inputs.label: Social Security elections
inputs.detail: Required for retirement cashflow and tax sequencing.

inputs.label: Simulation seed
inputs.detail: Required for deterministic reproducibility of Monte Carlo results.

inputs.label: Assumptions version tag
inputs.detail: Required for traceable versioned simulation assumptions.

inputs.label: RMD start timing
inputs.detail: RMD start timing is inferred from birth-year legislation rules; no explicit user-provided override exists.

inputs.label: Opaque holdings asset mapping
inputs.detail: Ambiguous holdings (TRP_2030, CENTRAL_MANAGED) require proxy asset-class mapping assumptions.

inputs.label: Payroll take-home estimate
inputs.detail: Runway payroll bridge guidance uses an inferred take-home factor (72%) rather than household-specific paycheck net modeling.

inputs.label: Payroll timing and proration assumptions
inputs.detail: Payroll effects rely on monthly proration and retirement-date timing assumptions rather than paycheck-level calendars.

inputs.label: Inheritance certainty
inputs.detail: Inheritance timing and realizable amount remain uncertain even with explicit tax treatment.

inputs.label: Home-sale proceeds realism
inputs.detail: Home sale is modeled with simplified net-proceeds assumptions (basis and/or explicit liquidity missing).

checks.label: Strategic recommendations include full evidence packets (baseline/counterfactual + MAGI/downside deltas)
checks.detail: All returned strategic recommendations include deterministic snapshots, MAGI/downside deltas, confidence, and sensitivity consistency.

checks.label: Accepted recommendation IDs match returned recommendation set
checks.detail: Recommendation ID ledger is internally consistent.

checks.label: Export includes required scenario sensitivity matrices
checks.detail: Inheritance and objective calibration scenario diagnostics are present.

checks.label: Model completeness indicator is explicitly declared
checks.detail: Model completeness is reconstructed; inferred assumptions are explicitly surfaced.

checks.label: Model fidelity layer classifies input quality and reliability impact
checks.detail: Fidelity score 83.59 with 0 blocking and 6 soft assumptions.

checks.label: Blocking assumptions are explicitly surfaced
checks.detail: No blocking assumptions detected by fidelity checks.

checks.label: Model trust section is explicit (trust level, score, assumptions, and input breakdown)
checks.detail: Trust level planning_grade with fidelity score 83.59.

checks.label: Inheritance dependence headline is explicit in export
checks.detail: Plan is inheritance-dependent; robustness 56.67 with fragility penalty 43.33.

checks.label: Downside metrics exported for raw and planner-enhanced outcomes
checks.detail: Early failure, shortfall severity, worst-decile wealth, and adverse equity-sale rates are exported.

checks.label: Closed-loop convergence diagnostics exported for both simulation modes
checks.detail: Both raw and planner-enhanced outcomes include converged status, passes used, stop reason, and final deltas.

checks.label: Roth conversion trace includes explicit yearly reason codes and summary counts
checks.detail: Planner-enhanced diagnostics include yearly Roth decision reasons and aggregated reason counts.

checks.label: Run-level closed-loop convergence proof is exported for every simulation trial
checks.detail: Run-level convergence entries match simulation runs (raw 500/500, planner 500/500).
